summary: Implemented CSV file upload and parsing functionality including: (1) financeRoutes.js with multer middleware configured for CSV-only uploads with a 10 MB size limit; (2) financeController.js with uploadCsv handler that orchestrates parsing, DB storage, and temp-file cleanup; (3) csvParser.js service with robust parsing using csv-parser, case-insensitive header normalisation, required-column validation, currency-symbol stripping, empty-row skipping, and a custom CsvParseError class; (4) Transaction.js model using better-sqlite3 with create, bulkCreate (atomic transaction), findById, findAll, and deleteAll methods; (5) config/db.js singleton database connection with WAL mode and foreign-key enforcement; (6) server/app.js Express application wiring; (7) comprehensive unit tests for csvParser covering happy paths and all error cases; (8) integration tests for the upload-csv endpoint using Supertest and an in-memory SQLite database; (9) package.json with all required dependencies.
